title: Marketing Coordinator
description: T. Rowe Price is seeking a Marketing Coordinator to support marketing campaigns and communications for our investment services. You'll coordinate event logistics, manage campaign materials, and support product marketing initiatives. Work hybrid in Irvine for a leading independent investment management company.
responsibilities: Coordinate marketing campaign execution and timeline management
Manage marketing materials and asset libraries
Support event logistics and attendee coordination
Assist with email marketing campaign setup and tracking
Prepare marketing reports and performance summaries

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or Business
skills: Project coordination and attention to detail
Marketing technology platforms and email tools

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
